title: stachys collina
intro: Stachys collina, also known as the alpine betony or mountain betony, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Stachys collina has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. Its medicinal properties have been associated with reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, making it a popular herb for women's health. Stachys collina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its health benefits and medicinal properties.
